goals: AI construction cost chatbot for 造价师 at 诚信行
journeys: User asks price query → clarification → results with source and judgment
User compares projects → comparison table with per-area metrics
Admin uploads SWT → data imported and searchable

calibration.high_pass: 0 failures + test count increased from previous sprint
tsc clean + stricter tsconfig options enabled

calibration.fail: health endpoint returns non-200 or times out
calibration.high_pass: 200 OK + all tool endpoints respond + stats show correct counts

product_quality_bar.criterion: Every judgment shows formula + inputs + calculation + confidence

calibration.fail: A verdict like '价格偏低' with no explanation
calibration.pass: Verdict with formula, inputs, calculation, source shown
calibration.high_pass: Full trace + visual confidence indicator + comparison context + drill-down to source data

calibration.fail: User asks '查价格' and system guesses a material
calibration.pass: System asks which material, unit, and time range
calibration.high_pass: System asks smart clarifying questions, suggests common options based on context

calibration.fail: Response contains emoji or casual language
calibration.pass: Professional tone, domain terminology, data disclaimer
calibration.high_pass: Indistinguishable from a senior 造价师's writing
